title: Come as You Are
album: Pat O'Brien Pavilion, Del Mar, Ca. December 28, 1991 (Remastered) [Live West Wood One FM Radio Broadcasting]
why_this_song: Come as You Are by Nirvana (1991) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "memoria" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "memoria" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come as you are, as you were
Take a rest as a friend
No, I don't have a gun

exercises.prompt_en: "Come as You Are" was released in 1991. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Come as You Are" foi lançada em 1991. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Come as You Are" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Come as You Are" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Nirvana one question about "Come as You Are", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Nirvana sobre "Come as You Are", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Come as You Are" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Come as You Are" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Come as You Are" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Come as You Are" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
